headline: Therapists save 2 hours daily with AI.
primary_text:
How much time will you spend on notes today?

If you're like most therapists, it's probably 1-2 hours. That's time you could be spending with clients, or better yet — actually leaving work on time.

JotPsych turns your session recordings into complete clinical notes in minutes. HIPAA-compliant, built specifically for behavioral health, and trusted by clinicians who were exactly where you are now.

See how it works — no sales call required.
